title: TopPlayers
description: Create leaderboards for ALL STATISTIC IN MINECRAFT [1.16 - 1.20.6]
body:
About
ATopPlayers is a plugin that allows you to create leaderboards for all statistics in minecraft!  (Support PlaceholderAPI)

You can remove leaderboards in new VERSION!
Prefer use MYSQL database for effcient!

Features:
 

Super efficient. Database MYSQL or SQLITE
Works with PlaceHolderAPI.
Works with all modern versions of Spigot/Bukkit/PaperSpigot!
Regular plugin updates with new features what u want!
Config file with lang!
Rewards for TOP PLAYERS
Holograms with TOP PLAYERS
GUI and CHAT with TOP PLAYERS
Now is 34 statistic from Minecraft! Soon more!
Hex COLORS Minecraft 1.16 use <#FF0000>

Requirements:
- Vault
This plugin requires PlaceHolderAPI and Java 17 or newer version!


Commands:
⁕ /tops - view all Tops on server in GUI
⁕ /tops help - view help
⁕ /tops <args> (1,2,3,4,5) - view top from args
Args: stone, coal, iron, gold, diamond, emerald, redstone, lapis
oak, spruce, birch, jungle, acacia, darkoak, crimson, warped
apple, wheat, bamboo, melon, pumpkin, beetroot, carrot, potato
fish, walk, jump, mobs, trade, chest, allblocks, kills, deaths, online
If u want change args check config file!
⁕ /tops reload - reload config file (top.reload permissions)
In new version:

You can use DecentHolograms and use placeholders from my plugin to put all statistic to holograms!
⁕ /tops holokills - create hologram kills
⁕ /tops holodeaths - make hologram deaths
⁕ /tops holoallblocks - make hologram mined allblocks
⁕ /tops holowalk - make hologram walks cm
⁕ /tops holostone - make hologram mined stones
⁕ /tops holodiamond - make hologram mined diamonds
⁕ /tops holoonline - make hologram online players
⁕ /tops holomobs - make hologram killed mobs
⁕ /tops holodelete - remove all holograms
For enable Holograms check config file and replace "hologramEnabled: 'false" to hologramEnabled: 'true'
Aliases: /top, /topplayers, /topp ,/topplayer, /topki, /topgraczy

HEX colors in config file:
To use hex color must write: '<#FF0000> message'

To load player stats, player must be on the server 1 minute!
Statistics are refreshed every minute!

GUI STATS

NEW IN NEWER VERSION

In new version:


For use this plugin MUST HAVE Java 11 or newer and install plugin PlaceholderAPI!

PlaceHolders:
- %atop_stone-1 to 10%
- %atop_coal-1 to 10%
- %atop_iron-1 to 10%
- %atop_gold-1 to 10%
- %atop_diamond-1 to 10%
